stage:parse
stage:strings
stage:pop
stage:inspect
1
stage:inspect-int-ok
"two"
stage:inspect-str-ok
True
stage:inspect-atom-ok
direct:1 one:7 map:12 join:1,2
stage:probe-ok
#(1, 2)
stage:inspect-intpair-ok
#(1, "two")
stage:inspect-mixed-ok
#(1, True)
stage:inspect-atompair-ok
stage:codepoints
stage:dict
stage:bits
stage:codecs
stage:uri
stage:payload
{"doubled":"2,4,6,8,10,12","evens":"2,4,6","total":21,"label":"GATE","decoded":"gate:3","parsed_int":"42","bad_int":"rejected","parsed_float":"5.0","string_checks":"T|T|T|a+b+c|éjà","popped":"é>x","inspected":"#(1, \"two\", True)","codepoints":"101,233","codepoint_round_trip":"eé","dict_hit":"2","dict_miss":"miss","sliced":"ell","joined":"hello!","hex":"68656C6C6F","b64":"aGVsbG8=","b64_round_trip":"hello","encoded":"a%20b%26c","decoded_uri":"a b&c"}
